elder_intro.speaker: ELDER
pages: You feel it too, then. The Vale holds its breath.
The Wraith bound our three Wardens with sigils of its own making. Marsh, wood, and ash.
Take the Grimoire. Craft what the Vale has never seen, and unbind them.
Start south. Even a Gloop will test a new wisp.

elder_progress.speaker: ELDER
pages: A Grand Sigil. So the old craft still answers. The others will be crueler.

elder_gate.speaker: ELDER
pages: Three sigils, three Wardens freed. The northern seal is broken.
The Wraith knows you are coming. Go anyway.

elder_postgame.speaker: ELDER
pages: The Vale breathes again. Wander it. You earned the quiet.

keeper_tips.speaker: KEEPER
pages: Tall grass bites. The shrine heals for free, so lean on it.
And craft often, slots are not promises.

twins_gossip_a.speaker: TWINS
pages: Slimes hate a good scorch. And a shock. Mostly they just lose.

twins_gossip_b.speaker: TWINS
pages: The turtle things out west? Crack them with Volt. Everything else just bounces.

scout_hints.speaker: SCOUT
pages: Shrines glow where people stopped going.
West woods, the ash flats, and one right here in the vale, behind the rocks southwest.

dreamer_lore.speaker: DREAMER
pages: I dreamt the Wraith was a Warden once. The fourth one. Nobody likes that dream.
